title: Unbreaka-tools
description: Tired of your tools/armour breaking? Let's change that!
body:
I've recently played minecraft with the [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/project/6hN1V6wJ) mod and fell in love with the ability to have tools that never break!

But! I've had problems including the mod into modpacks ­— either because of incompatibility or just mod loader issues — especially in versions of 1.21.1, and yet I wanted eternal tools.

So I decided to make a simple datapack that adds the `minecraft:unbreakable` component to all items in your hand, offhand and armor slots whenever some item changes durability.

I've tested it in 1.21.1, 1.21.5 and 26.1.2, but I imagine that any other version within that range will work!

If there is any item that is loosing durability and the datapack is not adding the `minecraft:unbreakable` component — like items on trinkets/curios/accessories slots — then just put that item on your offhand and cause any item on your mainhand to loose durability.
